user_stories.action: Execute the CLI binary without network connectivity
user_stories.outcome: so that I can manage tasks in a fully offline environment

acceptance_criteria.description: Application launches successfully without attempting to connect to external servers
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: System logs show zero outbound network connections (TCP/UDP) during startup and idle execution.

acceptance_criteria.description: Application returns success status when run without internet
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Command returns exit code 0 when executed in an air-gapped network environment.

user_stories.action: Create a new task via command line arguments
user_stories.outcome: so that I can record items to my local task list

acceptance_criteria.description: New task is persisted to the local storage file immediately
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Task entry exists in the local storage file within 50ms of command execution.

acceptance_criteria.description: Unique identifier is assigned to the created task
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Output string contains a unique UUID or timestamp-based ID for the new task.

user_stories.action: List all stored tasks from the local file
user_stories.outcome: so that I can review my pending work items

acceptance_criteria.description: CLI output displays all tasks currently stored in the local file
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Console output line count matches the number of entries in the local storage file.

acceptance_criteria.description: Task details are displayed without network latency
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Display completes before any network timeout threshold (e.g., < 100ms).

user_stories.action: Update an existing task's status or description
user_stories.outcome: so that I can modify my work items as needed

acceptance_criteria.description: Local storage file is rewritten with updated task data
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: File modification timestamp updates immediately upon command completion.

acceptance_criteria.description: Old task data is overwritten or replaced correctly
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Verification command shows updated values match input arguments, old values are absent.

user_stories.action: Delete a specific task from the local storage
user_stories.outcome: so that I can remove completed or unwanted items

acceptance_criteria.description: Task entry is removed from the local storage file
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Task ID is absent from the local storage file after deletion command execution.

acceptance_criteria.description: Application confirms deletion via CLI output
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Console prints 'Task deleted' message and returns exit code 0.

user_stories.action: Ensure data persists after application restart
user_stories.outcome: so that my tasks are not lost when I close and reopen the tool

acceptance_criteria.description: Storage file remains intact after system reboot
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: File exists and contains same content after host machine restart.

acceptance_criteria.description: Application reads existing data on launch
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: List command after restart shows previously created tasks without re-entry.

user_stories.action: Receive clear feedback when local storage fails
user_stories.outcome: so that I know why a command did not succeed

acceptance_criteria.description: Application returns error message for write failures
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Exit code 1 is returned and stderr contains 'Storage write failed' string.

acceptance_criteria.description: No data is lost during partial write failure
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Atomic write ensures file state is consistent; no partial task entries remain.
